## Why Clean Code Matters

Every line of code is read far more often than it is written. A function that takes three minutes to write might actually be read fifty times over its lifetime.

Clean code reduces cognitive load. When a developer opens a file — and immediately understands the structure — they can focus on the actual problem instead of deciphering clever tricks.

## The Cost of Shortcuts

Technical debt compounds. Every shortcut you take today becomes a tax on every change you make tomorrow.
